name: Alicante / Costa Blanca, Spain

visa.notes: No work permitted; A2 Spanish for permanent residency after 5 years

rent.notes: No VAT (IVA) on residential rent in Spain.
rent.gigInternetNotes: Spain has 88.76% national FTTH household coverage (CNMC, Sep 2024). 95.2% population has fiber access. Very competitive market with 4 major providers. Costa Blanca residential areas well-served. Minimal premium.

electricity.notes: Iberdrola/Endesa. A/C significant May–Sep (90°F summers). Electric heating in winter mild.

gas.notes: Natural gas or butano (propane canister ~€15/refill). Mild winters, less heating needed.

water.notes: AMAEM (Alicante municipal water). Includes alcantarillado (sewage). Tiered rates, water scarcity surcharges.

sewage.notes: Included in water bill as alcantarillado.

utilities.taxes: IVA included in bills: 10% on electricity, 10% on gas, 10% on water/sewage.
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment (Cable+1Gig). Trash included in rent. Sewage included in water bill.

healthcare.notes: Private insurance required for NLV visa (Sanitas/Adeslas ~€100-140/person/mo, higher with pre-existing conditions: hypertension, hypothyroidism, macular degeneration, obesity). After residency, can access public SNS. Anti-VEGF injections available through public system. Pre-existing condition loading 20-40% on premiums.

petDaycare.notes: Hired pet sitter 2 days/week (~€24/visit). Commercial daycare very limited on Costa Blanca. In-home pet sitting via Rover.com, Gudog, local cuidadores. Many expat pet sitters available.

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, NFL RedZone (DAZN), dining out (lunch for 2 2x/week w/ tax+tip)

phoneCell.notes: Google Fi Flexible (US Number) + Digi Mobil (Local). 2 phones, 1.5GB+ high-speed data each, all taxes included.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: SNS public system covers specialist visits and anti-VEGF injections at no cost. Private insurance copays for specialist visits €20-40. Frequent monitoring: ophthalmologist, endocrinologist, cardiologist. Prescription copays 10% for pensioners (max €8.23/mo).

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

stateIncomeTax.label: Spanish Income Tax (IRPF)
stateIncomeTax.exemptions: US-Spain tax treaty. Beckham Law flat 24% possible for new residents. SS per treaty.

taxes.notes: US-Spain tax treaty. Valencia region may add surcharge.

cons: A2 Spanish required for permanent residency

exchangeRates.note: EUR per 1 USD. Based on 2016-2026 historical range. Optimistic = strong EUR (good for USD→EUR), Pessimistic = weak EUR.
